action.reasoning: Observation: Hybrid model failed badly (R2 0.18, with NaN spikes during training). Best checkpoint is still the MLP from iter 9 with R2=0.517. We have only 0.87 hours left and 18 iterations. The hybrid run wasted 1.9h. Best safe option: ensure we keep the best ResMLP checkpoint and submit final eval. Decision: Don't train more — the existing best.pt was overwritten by the failing hybrid run! Need to check this. Actually the hybrid ran and saved its own checkpoint as best.pt overwriting ResMLP. I need to retrain ResMLP quickly to recover, then submit.
